accurate.why: All claims are accurate; COVID-19 context is accurate real-world context not in the bill text.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; all statutory references and dates match.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies termination of the March 13, 2020 COVID-19 national emergency.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Correctly notes use of section 202 of the National Emergencies Act.

exceptions_conditions.why: No material exceptions in this bill.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers the single operative provision of termination.

concise.why: Appropriately brief and focused for a one-provision resolution.

correct_entities.why: National Emergencies Act, Proclamation 9994 all correctly identified.
